title: Impossible Print — The Ranger's Story
description: Ranger Kiren Owl has been tracking a creature whose print matches nothing in the fauna catalogue. He hasn't told the Watch. He'll tell you if you ask the right way.

objectives.description: Visit the Verge outpost during Kiren's hours.
Examine the print Kiren keeps in his journal.

breadcrumbs.content: Print mass: ~250kg. Stride length: 1.8m. No known fauna matches. The print appears in three places in three nights. Something is crossing.

title: Impossible Print — The Stablemaster's Pattern
description: Orin Rede has been logging horses that come back from a particular Verge path exhausted past explanation. He thinks one rider has been borrowing them without name. The pattern overlaps Kiren's tracks.

objectives.description: Visit Orin during morning round (Stratus phase).

breadcrumbs.content: The exhausted horses match Kiren's print dates. Three horses returned on three of Kiren's print nights. The rider is real.

title: Impossible Print — The Courier's Portal
description: Crosswind Courier Kel Sandren has noticed one of the standing portals opening off-schedule. By minutes, then hours. Show Kel the print and the stable log.

objectives.description: Find Kel at the portal plaza (Stratus or Penanus).
Show Kel the stable log + print sketch.

breadcrumbs.content: Same three nights. Same three locations. Same three observations. Three witnesses, one creature, one cross-world breach.

title: Impossible Print — The Three Witnesses Meet
description: Bring Kiren, Orin, and Kel together. The synthesis triggers a procgen region spawn — the creature's territory, accessible now that the breach is mapped.

objectives.description: Deliver a meeting summons to all three (Kiren, Orin, Kel).
Attend the private meeting at the Seven Spokes back room.
Mark the convergence location; the procgen region spawns.

breadcrumbs.content: A new region has opened in the Verge. The creature is somewhere in there. So is what it's been guarding.
